What's going on everybody? So right now we are going to look at how to download the Agile campaign for bring a friend challenge. So you want to make your way over to member monetization course and then after that downloads for this module and under that lesson you should find the bring your friend challenge downloads. So go over those and we go to Agile bring a friend campaign click that they should already have your Agile account set up from the past from ALN or whatever it was before and then you just log in like normal sign in and the campaign will load up. There's just a couple things that you need to change within the campaign and we're gonna go over those right now. So the first thing you want to name your campaign for me I'm gonna name it BAF one because I already have a bring a friend challenge campaign in there so it won't save with the same name so but you can just name it BAF and then that could be that. Now I'm gonna categorize it under a folder I made previously which is member monetization and from there you can save the campaign and then you want to add a trigger to the campaign. Now the reason I name it BAF in all caps is also because that's what I want the tag to be for the contacts so we're gonna call this the BAF trigger and this happens tag is added you just leave that you want to keep it BAF all caps this is very important right here the tag you want to make sure that it's always in all caps because case sensitive and I mean you can have an extra character or type one there else the whole thing just won't work and then run the campaign on the contact so we're gonna run this on BAF one so what it's saying when contact gets that tag they ran on that campaign so in your case you could just run it on BAF again you don't have to have two so I'm gonna go back to this campaign and once you add that trigger you're gonna come back to the campaign click message one change the web hook you want to change it to your live web hook for Zapier whatever that is you just paste it right there and then you can save and you want to do that for all six messages there are six messages here so after you do that save the campaign and then that should go away there you go and then you can close this you don't have to add a trigger every time once you're done with the web hooks you want to go through there are also five emails that get sent in this campaign you want to go through each individual email just like this first thing you want to do is change the front name change that to your gym name and then after that you click HTML and click right here select the template from here you can upload your logo and there are some of out of the five emails some of them have phone numbers addresses or names whatever it is that you will need to read through and change according to what your gym name is or what coach you have excuse me what coach you have there and then after that you can change this picture of course you can change the name change the name of the gym phone number and email that if you want to you can add your Instagram and Facebook and then after you do that you want to save save the campaign then you want to move on to the next email so you want to save it after each edit you make for each one of these little nodes and other than that that about wraps it up for agile that's what you've got to do cool easy enough right alright
